import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/triposr')

import inspect
from tsr.models import nerf_renderer

# List all classes/functions in the module
print("Module contents:")
for name in dir(nerf_renderer):
    if not name.startswith('_'):
        obj = getattr(nerf_renderer, name)
        if inspect.isclass(obj) or inspect.isfunction(obj):
            print(f"  {name}: {type(obj).__name__}")

# Find the renderer class
for name in dir(nerf_renderer):
    obj = getattr(nerf_renderer, name)
    if inspect.isclass(obj) and hasattr(obj, 'forward'):
        print(f"\n=== {name}.forward ===")
        try:
            src = inspect.getsource(obj.forward)
            print(src[:3000])
        except:
            print("Could not get source")

# Also check the actual renderer on the model
from tsr.system import TSR
import torch

model = TSR.from_pretrained(
    "/models/triposr",
    config_name="config.yaml",
    weight_name="model.ckpt",
)
model.renderer.set_chunk_size(131072)
device = 'cuda:0'
model.to(device)

print("\n=== Actual renderer class ===")
print(type(model.renderer))
print(type(model.renderer).__mro__)

print("\n=== Renderer forward source ===")
try:
    src = inspect.getsource(model.renderer.forward)
    print(src[:5000])
except:
    print("Could not get source")

print("\n=== Renderer query_triplane source ===")
try:
    src = inspect.getsource(model.renderer.query_triplane)
    print(src[:3000])
except:
    print("No query_triplane method")
